title: Amtech I8855 8 Piece Folding Key Set
features: DURABLE: This hex key set is made from chrome vanadium steel with a satin finish
EASY STORAGE: The set includes sizes: 1.5mm, 2mm, 2.5mm, 3mm, 4mm, 5mm, 6mm, 8mm and the keys fold into the grip handle for easy storage
RELIABLE PERFORMANCE: Designed for consistent results across repeated use
ERGONOMIC USE: Built for comfort and ease of handling during long sessions
COMPACT FORMAT: Conveniently sized for storage in toolboxes and cabinets
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee.
